artPrompt: An evocative enchantment scene of a battered revival snack cart bound shut with seven glowing wax seals stamped in cold gold, each radiating ominous light, parked in a smoky midnight square as ashen-robed figures circle it warily. The vast clock tower looms in the blood-dark sky. The sealed cart anchors the lower frame, sacred dread rising upward. Wide 4:3 landscape, bone white and deep black, solemn end-times mood, rendered as a vibrant gouache storybook illustration — saturated matte color, simplified flat-ish shapes, soft painterly edges, decorative.
name: Seven Seals of the Snack Cart
text:
Seven Seals of the Snack Cart enters the battlefield with seven seal counters on it.
At the beginning of your upkeep, roll a six-sided die. Remove that many seal counters, then put that many doom counters on the Doomsday Clock and each opponent loses 1 life per seal removed.
When the last seal counter is removed, sacrifice this and the snack cart is, at long last, opened. Each player may eat a snack. It is the final snack. Savor it.
flavorText: The first seal: pretzels. The second seal: also pretzels. By the seventh, no one is hungry anymore.
